name: Tanshinone IIA
summary: Tanshinone IIA is a Salvia miltiorrhiza diterpene with cardiovascular mechanistic relevance, but oral isolated human RCT evidence remains unresolved.
description: Tanshinone IIA is a Salvia-derived quinone studied for cardiometabolic and vascular signaling; human interpretation is complicated by formulations.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.
dosage: standardized extract or essential-oil-free preparation when oral use is intended
typical_dosage: standardized extract or essential-oil-free preparation when oral use is intended
